MINI MINUTES: Case Consolidated with Case NO. 403111 California Indemnity Insurance vs. Hertz Equipment Rental Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders consolidated cases dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Susan Lee. (212)
